hooks.command: prompt=$(jq -r '.prompt'); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qi 'new task'; then git checkout main && git pull origin main 2>/dev/null || true; fi
prompt=$(jq -r '.prompt'); if echo "$prompt" | grep -qi 'job done'; then git push && gh run watch $(gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId') 2>/dev/null || true; fi
git checkout main && git pull origin main 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'V[0-9]+__.*\.sql$'; then if git ls-files --error-unmatch "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCK: Flyway migration already committed to git. Create a new versioned migration file instead (never edit existing ones)."; exit 2; fi; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'web-client/src/.*\.tsx?$'; then cd /Users/admin/projects/cc/task-managment/web-client && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
